allow: Bash(node -e "const { getSprite, identifyHardware } = require\(''./src/sprites''\); const hw = identifyHardware\({ gpu: { model: ''RTX 4090 ASUS ROG STRIX'', vramMB: 24000, vendor: ''NVIDIA'' }, cpu: { brand: ''AMD Ryzen 9 7950X'', cores: 16 }, storage: { type: ''NVMe'' }, ram: { totalGB: 64 }, isLaptop: false }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(hw, null, 2\)\); const s = getSprite\({ gpu: { model: ''RTX 4090 ASUS ROG STRIX'', vramMB: 24000, vendor: ''NVIDIA'' }, cpu: { brand: ''AMD Ryzen 9 7950X'', cores: 16 }, storage: { type: ''NVMe'' }, ram: { totalGB: 64 }, isLaptop: false }\); console.log\(''hw:'', JSON.stringify\(s.hw\)\); console.log\(''has back.draw:'', typeof s.back.draw\); console.log\(''has front.draw:'', typeof s.front.draw\); console.log\(''has drawBackHit:'', typeof s.drawBackHit\); console.log\(''has drawBackKO:'', typeof s.drawBackKO\);")

Bash(node -e "const { identifyHardware } = require\(''./src/sprites''\); console.log\(''Mid Intel/AMD:'', JSON.stringify\(identifyHardware\({ gpu: { model: ''Radeon RX 7600'', vramMB: 8000, vendor: ''AMD'' }, cpu: { brand: ''Intel Core i5-13400'', cores: 6 }, storage: { type: ''SSD'' }, ram: { totalGB: 16 } }\)\)\); console.log\(''Low/Celeron:'', JSON.stringify\(identifyHardware\({ gpu: { model: ''Intel UHD Graphics 630'', vramMB: 128, vendor: ''Intel'' }, cpu: { brand: ''Intel Celeron N4500'', cores: 2 }, storage: { type: ''HDD'' }, ram: { totalGB: 4 } }\)\)\); console.log\(''Apple:'', JSON.stringify\(identifyHardware\({ gpu: { model: ''Apple M3 Max'', vramMB: 0, vendor: ''Apple'' }, cpu: { brand: ''Apple M3 Max'', cores: 14 }, storage: { type: ''NVMe'' }, ram: { totalGB: 36 } }\)\)\);")
